email-domain-purposes.png.note: SUPERSEDED by email-domain-purposes-v2.png (2026-07-17): original left the 'Staging Test Brand' chip visible in the brand-chip bar. Original note: Brand Settings > Profile > Domain Management, domain panel for mail.lumonfresh.com (Lumon Fresh brand) with Advanced > Purposes expanded and scrolled to show all 7 purpose toggles (Cold Outreach Non-Consensual + 6 Consensual warm purposes) plus the 'Multiple Purposes Selected' isolation advisory banner. Cosmetic fixes: renamed the seed domain from 'email-testing.franchiseapplicantportal.com' to 'mail.lumonfresh.com' and the display name from 'Staging Outreach' to 'Lumon Fresh Newsletter'.

email-domain-purposes-v2.png.note: Reshoot of email-domain-purposes.png (2026-07-17): same route/state/crop (Brand Settings > Profile > Domain Management, domain panel for mail.lumonfresh.com, Advanced > Purposes expanded and scrolled to show all 7 purpose toggles plus the 'Multiple Purposes Selected' isolation advisory banner), now with the 'Staging Test Brand' chip hidden from the brand-chip bar (targeted fix; the chip bar renders an off-screen ResizeObserver measurement clone of every chip -- must only display:none the real visible chip, hiding the clone corrupts the overflow calc and silently drops unrelated real chips). Same cosmetic domain/display-name renames as the original (email-testing.franchiseapplicantportal.com -> mail.lumonfresh.com, Staging Outreach -> Lumon Fresh Newsletter, including the banner's subdomain example). Agent-captured 2026-07-17, 1680x1050 CSS viewport, 2x, dom-sanitize with freshenDates:false. No cursor -- read-only orientation state.

email-sending-methods.png.note: SUPERSEDED by email-sending-methods-v2.png (2026-07-17): original left both the 'Knowledge Base' sidebar item and the 'Staging Test Brand' chip visible. Original note: Marketing > Workflows page, Lumon Fresh brand, default Sequences tab showing the 5-tab bar (Sequences, Automations, Runs, Content, Analytics) and one sequence row. Cosmetic fix: renamed the seed sequence name from 'Test Workflow' to 'Welcome Sequence'.

email-sending-methods-v2.png.note: Reshoot of email-sending-methods.png (2026-07-17): same route/state/crop (Marketing > Workflows page, Lumon Fresh brand, default Sequences tab showing the 5-tab bar and one sequence row), now with the 'Knowledge Base' sidebar item and the 'Staging Test Brand' chip both hidden (display:none on the real elements; the chip bar's off-screen ResizeObserver measurement clone was left untouched to avoid corrupting the overflow calc). Same cosmetic rename as the original (Test Workflow -> Welcome Sequence). Agent-captured 2026-07-17, 1680x900 CSS clip, 2x, dom-sanitize with freshenDates:false. No cursor -- read-only orientation state.
